---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit a pull request for review
title: '[PR] '
labels: ''
assignees: ''
---

## Description

Brief description of the changes made in this pull request.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (changes to documentation only)
- [ ] Performance improvement (non-breaking change that improves performance)
- [ ] Code refactoring (non-functional changes that improve code quality)
- [ ] Tests (adding or updating tests)
- [ ] Other (please describe):

## Related Issues

Fixes # (issue number)
Relates to # (issue number)
Closes # (issue number)

## Motivation and Context

Why is this change necessary? What problem does it solve?

If this change fixes a bug, please include the bug report or issue link.

If this is a feature request, please describe the use case and benefits.

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Performance benchmarks run (if applicable)
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

**Test Results:**
```
// Paste test output here

```

## Screenshots / Logs

If applicable, add screenshots or logs to help explain your changes.

## Documentation

- [ ] API documentation updated (rustdoc comments)
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Tutorials updated (if needed)
- [ ] Examples added/updated (if needed)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] Added inline comments for complex code

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated the CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) document
- [ ] I have followed the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

## Performance Impact

If this change affects performance, please include benchmark results:

**Before:**
```
// Benchmark results before changes

```

**After:**
```
// Benchmark results after changes

```

## Breaking Changes

If this PR introduces breaking changes, please describe them:

**Breaking Change:**
- Description of what changed
- Migration guide for users
- Version where this takes effect

## Additional Notes

Any additional information or context that reviewers should know.

## Reviewer Guidelines

For reviewers:

1. **Code Quality**: Check for clean, idiomatic Rust code
2. **Tests**: Ensure tests are comprehensive and passing
3. **Documentation**: Verify docs are clear and complete
4. **Performance**: Consider performance implications
5. **Security**: Check for potential security issues
6. **API Design**: Ensure API is consistent and intuitive

## Merge Requirements

Before merging, this PR should:

- [ ] Pass all CI checks
- [ ] Have at least one approval from maintainers
- [ ] Have all review comments addressed
- [ ] Be up-to-date with the main branch
- [ ] Have no merge conflicts

---

**Thank you for your contribution to dodecet-encoder!**
